STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-21-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-21-1993, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-20-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
